overview: A smart campus waste management system with two dedicated views: facilities staff can monitor bin fill levels and dispatch collection teams, while campus managers see predictive forecasts and waste trends to plan extra collections before they're needed.
features: Role-based dashboards for staff and managers
Real-time bin fill level monitoring across 30 campus bins
Predictive collection scheduling for the next 7 days
Collection dispatch and history tracking for facilities staff
Waste trends and building-level reports for campus managers
Color-coded urgency indicators (green/yellow/red) for bin status
Simulated campus data with realistic fill patterns
